title: prunus × lannesiana f. fudanzakura
intro: Prunus × lannesiana f. fudanzakura is a cultivar of flowering cherry tree, specifically a cross between Prunus lannesiana and Prunus serrulata, known for its stunning pink flowers and dark green leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Prunus × lannesiana f. fudanzakura include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as exhibiting potential anti-cancer properties. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or capsules, and are often used to support immune function and overall well-being.
